title: Lunarbit+
description: Lunarbit is a lightweight Minecraft modpack that boosts performance and adds subtle quality-of-life features for a smoother, faster vanilla+ experience.
body: Lunarbit+ is a lightweight Minecraft modpack focused on performance optimization and quality-of-life improvements, designed for players who want a smoother, faster, and smarter vanilla+ experience. Perfect for low-end systems or players who just want their game to feel better, Lunarbit includes frame-boosting tweaks, UI enhancements, control refinements, and intelligent client-side features — all without straying far from the vanilla aesthetic.
